treatment_information.treatment_response: Failure to thrive persisted, leading to discontinuation
Improvement in hypokalaemia and failure to thrive

treatment_timeline.event: Initial diagnosis of impaired renal concentration
Water deprivation test and vasopressin administration test conducted
Treatment with indomethacin and spironolactone started
Diagnosis of amelogenesis imperfecta (AI) and referral to department

patient_outcome.final_status: Diagnosed with enamel-renal syndrome (ERS) complicated with Bartter-like syndrome and impaired renal concentration
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Further research needed to clarify the pathogenesis of AI and nephrocalcinosis
